# After Hours Pool Co — LLM Summary
# Updated: 2026-04-26

> After Hours Pool Co. is a custom pool builder based in Phoenix, Arizona. The company specializes in fixed-scope, fixed-price residential swimming pools with an 8-week build timeline. All pools include premium materials as standard: PebbleTec interior finish, Jandy equipment, premium imported tile, LED nicheless color-changing lights, and high-head variable speed pumps.

## Company
- Name: After Hours Pool Co.
- Location: Phoenix, AZ (serves the greater Valley of the Sun)
- Service area: Phoenix, Scottsdale, Peoria, Mesa, Gilbert, Chandler
- Specialty: New residential swimming pool construction (in-ground concrete)
- Build timeline: 8 weeks from excavation to startup
- Pricing model: All-in fixed price — no upsells, no hidden costs
- Construction type: Shotcrete (gunite) concrete pools
- Phone: (602) 803-3095
- Hours: Monday-Friday, 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM

## Pool Tiers
- Private Pool: $45,000 — 10x18 ft, ideal for smaller yards and intimate escapes
- Social Pool: $52,500 — 12x24 ft, designed for weekend crowds and tanning
- Gathering Pool: $60,000 — 14x28 ft, designed for entertaining and full outdoor living
- All tiers include: PebbleTec PebbleSheen finish, premium imported tile, limestone/travertine/porcelain coping, LED nicheless color-changing lighting, high-head variable speed pump, Jandy AquaLink automation, Baja shelf

## Optional Add-Ons (apply to any tier)
- Baja Shelf: Included at no charge
- Salt System: $4,000
- Heater (includes gas plumbing and electrical): $9,500
- Heat/Cool Pump (includes plumbing and electrical): $8,500
- Chiller (includes plumbing and electrical): $6,500
- Infloor Cleaning (Paramount system): $12,500
- Spa: $25,000

## Build Process — 8 Weeks
- Week 1: Excavation
- Week 2: Plumbing
- Week 3: Rebar
- Week 4: Electric
- Week 5: Shotcrete
- Week 6: Tile and decking
- Week 7: Surface (interior finish)
- Week 8: Startup (water fill, balance, equipment walkthrough)
